scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules && rm -rf build && rm -rf src/ui/node_modules && rm -rf src/ui/build && rm package-lock.json; rm src/ui/package-lock.json
scripts.build: npm run build-api && npm run build-ui
scripts.build-api: npm config set strict-ssl false && npm install --loglevel verbose && echo 'calling tsoa' && tsoa spec-and-routes && echo 'calling tsc' && tsc --listEmittedFiles && echo 'tsc done'
scripts.debug-basic-auth: BASIC_AUTH_ENABLED=true http_proxy= https_proxy= npm run debug
scripts.debug-inspect: http_proxy= https_proxy= nodemon --exec node --inspect=0.0.0.0:9230 -r ts-node/register src/app.ts
scripts.test-sbom-inspect: http_proxy= https_proxy= node --inspect-brk=0.0.0.0:9230 -r ts-node/register test/test.ts createSbom https://github.com/finos/a11y-theme-builder.git
scripts.test-stream-inspect: http_proxy= https_proxy= node --inspect-brk=0.0.0.0:9230 -r ts-node/register test/test.ts streamDocs
